title: ChannelState
description: Checkpoint state file for a single Telegram channel.

channel_id.description: Channel username used as system key.

last_success_message_id.description: Highest message_id confirmed written to raw storage. Null if never succeeded.

last_success_message_date.description: message_date of the last successfully stored message.

last_success_run_id.description: run_id of the last run that successfully stored data for this channel.

last_success_at.description: Wall-clock UTC time of the last successful write.

last_attempt_at.description: Wall-clock UTC time of the most recent state save (success or error).

error_count.description: Cumulative number of runs that ended in error for this channel.

last_error.description: Error message from the last failed run. Present only when status=error.
